name: skip-wait
description: Bypass countdown timers and skip waiting pages. Instant access on link shorteners and file hosts - no wait, one click. Works on any site with wait timers.

scripts.build: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; try { rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); } catch {}" && tsc -b && concurrently "vite build" "vite build --config vite.content.config.ts"
scripts.screenshot: npm run build && npx playwright install chromium && node scripts/screenshot.mjs
